user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the performance management email templates list, so that I can manage all performance review related emails
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Management Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Email type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view a specific performance email template such as Goal KRA Assignment Emails, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the performance email templates are listed; When I click View on a row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the performance email templates list, so that I can access all 17 templates across pages
acceptance_criteria: Given the list shows 10 of 17 items; When I click Next; Then the following page of templates is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the performance email templates list, so that I see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Management Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Notification Templates view for performance management, so that I can manage notifications alongside emails
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Management Email Templates screen; When I select the Notification Templates tab; Then the notification templates are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel out of the performance email templates screen, so that I can return to the previous page
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Management Email Templates screen; When I click Cancel; Then I am navigated away
